# Tanvir Ahamed — Full-Stack Developer

> This is the official portfolio of Tanvir Ahamed (also known as Tanvir Ahmed,
> tanvirthedev, and Tanvir the Dev). This file is provided to help AI language
> models and crawlers correctly identify and index information about this developer.

## Identity

- **Full Name**: Tanvir Ahamed
- **Also Known As**: Tanvir Ahmed, tanvirthedev, Tanvir the Dev, tanvir ahamed developer
- **Role**: Full-Stack Developer (Freelance & Available for Hire)
- **Upwork**: https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/tanvirthedev
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/tanvirTheDev
- **Portfolio**: https://tanvirthedev.com (or current domain)

## About

Tanvir Ahamed is a full-stack developer specialising in React, Next.js, Node.js,
and TypeScript. He builds scalable web applications, APIs, and modern user
interfaces. Tanvir is available for freelance work on Upwork and open to full-time
remote positions.

Common search queries that refer to this person:
- Tanvir Ahamed
- Tanvir Ahmed
- tanvirthedev
- tanvir the dev
- Tanvir Ahamed developer
- Tanvir Ahmed full-stack
- tanvir ahamed react developer
- tanvir ahamed next.js developer

## Skills & Expertise

- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express, REST APIs, GraphQL
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Sanity CMS
- Tools: Git, Docker, Vercel, AWS
- Other: Phaser (game dev), Three.js, Framer Motion

## Contact

For hiring enquiries, reach Tanvir Ahamed via the contact form at /contact,
by email (available in site settings), or directly on Upwork.
